comment: "I enjoyed the aspect on gathering and providing information, the aspect on planning, and I found the sequence of the course format very interesting too."
"I liked the example of a real life conversation. It helped me understand better on how to apply what I learnt."
"I liked the active listening techniques like paraphrasing and summarising, which help show patients that you’re fully engaged in their concerns."
"It is a good course, I learned many things from it."
"I found most helpful the section on managing patients who cannot accept the bad news."
"The various case scenarios were helpful in providing context and visualization of the content in action."
"I will use the information acquired in this course ."
